verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Aaron leh amah tawh a om a tapate, a puante, a nilh sathau, khialhna hanga biakna a bawngtal, a tuutal nihte leh silngo sawhloh anlum lawh la in la
kikhopna bukkongah Israel mihonte khempeuh khawm in,” a ci hi
Topa in amah a thupiak bangin Moses in hih a, kikhopna bukkongah mihonte kikhawm hi
Moses in mihonte kiangah, “Tu-a ka hih dingte pen Topa in hih dingin a thupiak ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Moses in Aaron leh a tapate paipihin tui tawh amaute a sil hi
Amah in a puantungsilh amah silhsak a, a kawnggak tawh gakin, a puantualpi silhsak a, a siampipuan silhsakin, siampipuan' khau, hoihtakin a kigan tawh gak a, tua tawh ama tungah a khih hi
Amah in ama tungah a awmdal bulhin, a awmdal sungah Urim leh Thummim a koih hi
Amah in Aaron' lu tungah a dialpi khim sakin, a dialpi tung a mailamah, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin amah in kham peek, a siangtho kumpi lukhu a khusak hi
Tua ciangin Moses in nilh sathau la-in, biakbuk leh a sunga om khempeuh nuhin tuate a ap hi
Amah in biakna tau tungah tuate kimkhat sagihvei thehin, biakna tau leh a nazat khempeuh leh kuang leh a ngaknate, ap dingin sathau a nuh hi
Amah in nilh sathau kimkhat Aaron' tungah sung a, ap dingin amah a sathau a nilh hi
Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin, Moses in Aaron' tapate paipih a, puantungsilhte silh sakin, kawnggak tawh amaute gak a, amau' lu tungah lukhute a khih hi
Tua ciangin amah in khialhna hanga biakna bawngtal paipih a, Aaron leh a tapate in tua bawngtal lu tungah amau' khut nga uh hi
Kilemna bawlna dingin Moses in a bawngtal go a, a si la-in a kiima biakna tau kite a khutme tawh nuhin, biakna tau siangthosak a, biakna tau bulah a site sungkhia-in a ap hi
A sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh leh a sintuamte leh a kal nihte a thau tawh la-in, biakna tau tungah tuate a hal hi
Ahih hangin, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin a omlai a vun, a sa leh a ek, amah in giahphual pualamah mei tawh a hal hi
Tua ciangin Moses in meihal biakna tuutal pia a, Aaron leh a tapate in tuutal lu tungah amau' khut nga uh hi
Moses in tua tuutal go-in, biakna tau tung kimkotah a si theh hi
Tuutal a kisemnen ciangin, Moses in a lu leh a ki-atnente leh a thau a hal hi

Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin, a sungkuate leh a khete tui tawh a kisawp khit ciangin, Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal biakna a gim namtui, meihal biakna-in Moses in biakna tau tungah tuutal buppi a hal hi
Tua ciangin Moses in a tuutal dang, kipsakna tuutal pia a, Aaron leh a tapate in tuutal lu tungah amau' khut nga uh hi
Moses in tuutal go a, a si tawmkhat la-in Aaron' taklam bilteep leh a taklam khutpi leh a taklam khepi nuh hi
Aaron' tapate hong kipaipih a, Moses in amau' taklam bilteepte leh amau' taklam khutpite leh amau' taklam khepite a si tawmkhat nuh a, a si a val laite, biakna tau tung kimkotah a theh hi
Tua ciangin amah in a thau, a mei thau leh a sungkuate tunga om a thau khempeuh leh a sintuamte, a kal nihte leh a thau, leh a taklam phei a la hi
Topa' mai-ah a om silngo sawhloh anlum lawh sung panin amah in silngo sawhloh moh khat leh sathau sawh anlum moh khat leh mohpheng khat la-in, a thau tung leh a taklam phei tungah tuate a koih hi
Amah in hihte khempeuh, Aaron leh a tapate' khutsungah koih a, amaute in vei-a biakna-in Topa' mai-ah tuate a vei uh hi
Tua ciangin Moses in amaute' khutsung panin tuate la-in, Topa' tungah meihal biakpiakna, a gim namtui, kipsakna biakna-in biakna tau tungah meihal biakna tawh tuate a hal khawm hi
Moses in a iik la-in vei-a biakna-in Topa' mai-ah a vei hi. Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin tua pen kipsakna tuutal panin Moses' tanh ahi hi

Tua ciangin Moses in nilh sathau kimkhat leh biakna tau tunga om a si la-in, Aaron leh ama tapate leh amau' puante tungah a theh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Aaron leh ama tapate, a puante uh tawh a apkhawm hi

Moses in Aaron leh a tapate kiangah, “Keimah in thu hong pia-in, ‘Aaron leh a tapate in ne ding uh hi,’ ka cih mah bangin, kikhopna buk kongah a sa huan un la, tua lai munah tua sa leh kipsakna biakna lawh sungah a om anlum ne un la
a sa leh anlum na khamvalte uh mei tawh na hal ding uh hi
Note hong kikipsakna ding hun ni sagih sung hi ding ahih manin, note hong kikipsakna hun a cin' mateng, kikhopna bukkong pua-ah ni sagih sung na paikhia kei ding uh hi
Tuni-a kibawl bangin, note-a' dingin kilemna bawl ding, Topa in thu hong pia khin hi

Kikhopna bukkongah ni sagih sung sun leh zan na om ding uh a, Topa' hong sawlte na hih ding uh hi. Tua hi kei leh note na si ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang dingin keima tungah thu hong kipia hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Aaron leh a tapate in zong, Topa in Moses' tung tawnin a thupiakte khempeuh a hih uh hi.
